ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "cellnumber" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user in the form of a cell number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user (1 for male, 2 for female) */,
  "jointime" TEXT /* Time the user joined the service, represented as a timestamp */,
  "star" INTEGER /* User rating or engagement score */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user's subscription plan */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Time when the user's profile was last updated */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device the user primarily uses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "monthly_fee" TEXT /* Monthly fee for the plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit in GB for the plan */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Validity period in days for the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)
